title: biarum orientale
intro: Biarum orientale, also known as the Oriental Arum or Wild Calla, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Arum family. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Biarum orientale include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Biarum orientale is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and roots are used in herbal preparations to extract its medicinal properties.
